items.title: Sangamo’s three-decade run comes to a close as Lilly and Astellas eye assets
items.description:
Despite being an early player in the gene editing field and developing numerous clinical programs, Sangamo Therapeutics will be selling off its parts without materializing any approved therapies.

items.title: AbbVie makes $10.9B move for Apogee's long-acting I&I drug candidates
items.description:
